snippet.title: Hi, my name is Doechii 😎✨❤️
How To Get Funded $100k+ For Trading (The5ers Prop Firm)
snippet.description:
In this interview, I sit down with Saul Lokier full-time trader and general manager at The5ers prop firm. We discuss how traders can get funded by The5ers and scale up to $3.6M (currently the maximum capital you can get from this prop firm). You'll also learn from Saul's journey as a trader as well as the obstacles he had to overcome.

Take The5ers prop firm challenge (5% Discount on your 1st Evaluation): https://d2t.link/the5ers

Chapters: 
0:00 Start of the intervierw
0:13 Introduction
0:48 Who are Saul and The5ers?
1:24 Why did Saul join The5%ers in the 1st place?
2:10 How The5%ers is different from most online prop firms
3:42 When should you look to become a funded trader
4:48 Saul's experience with other online prop "challenges"
6:32 Why 30-day time limits are bad for traders
7:53 Quick overview of The%5ers options for trader funding
11:00 How The5%ers makes money
11:37 Why the5%ers need profitable traders
12:05 How the new Freestyle program helps profitable traders
13:53 What is the maximum drawdown for funded traders
14:42 Why you don't need more than 1:30 leverage
15:46 How to choose the correct prop firm for you
18:11 Top tips to pass a prop firm evaluation and get funded
20:29 Why your trading strategy doesn't matter
21:10 Top habits from funded traders
22:38 How many funded traders are then in The5%ers
24:32 How prop firm traders inspire growth
25:26 How fast can you scale your funding with the5%ers
27:36 How can trading millions affect trader psychology
29:02 The importance of having a team for funded traders
30:05 Areas of improvement for The5%ers
33:04 Where to find Saul and The5%ers

#propfirm #fundedtrading #fundedtrader

Forex Broker (Pepperstone): https://d2t.link/pepperstone
Forex Broker for Canada (Axi): https://d2t.link/axitrader
Best Platform: https://d2t.link/tradingview
Backtesting Tool: https://d2t.link/soft4fx
VPS (for algo trading): https://d2t.link/vps
Trading Journal: https://d2t.link/journal

// ABOUT ME
My name is Etienne Crete (from Montreal, Canada). I'm a swing Forex trader and help aspiring Forex traders develop a trading method that works for them so they can produce income allowing them to live with more freedom.  

I blog at www.desiretotrade.com and host the Desire To Trade Podcast. I was fed up with the “fake” millionaire traders and the “get-rich-quick-trading guys”. That's why you can expect more free content from me than what other people charge for!

If you truly want to succeed in Forex trading, I believe you need to keep working on yourself so you can improve your strengths, but also your weaknesses. Do not focus solely on what you're good at.

// Disclaimer
This video expresses my personal opinion only. Forex trading is risky. Make sure you are ready to trade. Even this will not guarantee you positive results. I am not responsible for any losses incurred due to your trading or anything else. I do not recommend any specific trade or action.

snippet.title: "Fully Automated Trading Systems" - Matt DeLong | Trader Interview
snippet.description:
In this trader interview, Etienne sits down wth full-time automated trading systems developer Matt DeLong. He is a pro when it comes to mastering algo trading and strategy development. Matt will teach you how you can create fully automated trading systems that can be run fairly hands-off.

Chapters:
0:00 Not every trading strategy can be automated!
0:24 Introduction
1:05 What has Matt done since his last interview with Etienne
3:29 Why Matt's algo was originally a Long only strategy
5:03 How Matt constructs algorithmic trading strategies
7:22 Why algos should look at multiple timeframes
7:54 Is Matt an algo trader or algo manager?
9:08 How can someone using algo protect their capital
11:10 How Matt monitors his algo trades
13:18 How can you know when you need to replace an algo
15:28 How can you know that the market conditions have changed
17:35 How can you get started with being an algo trader
20:16 Why Tradingview data works well for Matt
21:37 How can you determine if a strategy is good from its statistics
25:16 What platform does Matt use to be able to trade on multiple brokers
27:20 How can you get an algo built for trading
29:03 What is Matt's preferred programming platform for trading

snippet.title: "The Reality of Full-Time Trading" - Rolf Schlotmann | Trader Interview
snippet.description:
In this trader interview, Etienne sits down with full-time trader Rolf Schlotmann (from @Tradeciety) to discuss what it's really like to build a full-time trading career. You'll learn from his experience on how to become a consistently profitable Forex trader.

📈 FREE Case Study "Quitting Your Job To Finally Trade Full-Time": https://desiretotrade.co/case-study

Where to find Rolf:
Education: @Tradeciety 
Trading journal: https://d2t.link/edgewonk

Chapters: 
0:00 "The Reality of Full-Time Trading"
0:36 Introduction
0:57 Who is Rolf Schlotmann?
2:01 Story Time - How trading started out
2:55 How Rolf decided to go full time trading
5:05 Why his early 20s was the best time to take risks
7:12 What is Rolf's trading style
8:06 How to overcome FOMO in the markets
9:23 Pivot Points: Rolf's favorite indicator
10:30 How to use Pivot Points
11:32 Why objectivity and structure is vital in trading
12:30 How to make Price Action trading more objective
14:04 What more is there to price action trading
16:42 How to filter market conditions
18:09 The importance of accepting losses
19:55 Why the obvious things are harder to trade

snippet.title: 186 - The Disappearance of Gail Joiner
snippet.description:
Take the Trace Evidence 2022 Survey:  https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/RXB9HZW

On the first day of Fall in 1972, thirteen year old Gail Joiner rushed home from school to her parents house in Thonotosassa, Florida.  An hour later, the teen attached a leash to her beloved pet racoon's collar and strode out of the house to take him on his daily walk.  She never returned.

Despite exhaustive searches involving more than 200 people, not a trace of Gail was ever found.  Within a month of her disappearance the case had grown cold and the investigation was scaled back.  For the next decade, her case lingered in the limbo of joining other cold case files.

Then in October of 1982, a confessed serial killer took credit for Gail's murder.  After allegedly leading police to where he had disposed of her body, Gerald Stano retracted his confession and Gail's remains were never found.  Had Stano been responsible, or was this another case of a murderer taking credit for crimes he didn't commit?

FB: https://www.facebook.com/TraceEvidencePod/

IG: https://www.instagram.com/traceevidencepod/

TW: https://twitter.com/TraceEvPod

Visit https://www.trace-evidence.com  for more information, case photos, contact information and more.

Merch: https://traceevidence.threadless.com/ 

Music Courtesy of: "Lost Time" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 License http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/

Sources:  https://www.trace-evidence.com/gail-joiner

0:00 - Intro
01:47 - Show Notes
03:19 - Case Evidence
51:26 - Theories
01:10:25 - Closing

You'll get to learn more about what it takes to generate a full-time income from systematic trading!

In this trader interview, I interview professional trader Aatu Kokkila who got funded more than $8 million by Darwinex in managed capital. He shares his story as a fund manager and pro trader.

📈 FREE Case Study "Quitting Your Job To Finally Trade Full-Time": https://desiretotrade.co/case-study

Chapters: 
0:00 The best of news trading
0:19 Introduction
0:43 How Aatu started in trading
2:55 What factor made Aatu change his way of trading
3:56 How he discovered his trading style
5:30 How Aatu got millions via Darwinex
7:18 The mindset of managing millions in trading
9:49 Why you should stay true to your style
10:52 How Aatu journals and develops his skill as a trader
11:34 How Aatu trades news for huge profits
13:18 Trade strategy showcase (screen share)
18:46 How Aatu exits his trades
20:20 Why you need to see the whole context when trading news
21:50 How Aatu gets his information and context for news trading
23:06 Why it's essential to have a good team
24:43 What is required to build a hedge fund
26:39 How you can get started in the path of building your fund
31:19 Where to find Aatu
31:55 What is next for Aatu and Finbou 

Aatu's website: https://www.finbou.com

#fundedtrader #millionairetrader #traderinterview

// MUSIC
David Cutter Music - http://www.davidcuttermusic.com
Andrew Applepie - https://andrewapplepie.com/

// ABOUT ME
My name is Etienne Crete (from Montreal, Canada). I'm a swing Forex trader and help aspiring Forex traders develop a trading method that works for them so they can produce income allowing them to live with more freedom.  

I blog at www.desiretotrade.com and host the Desire To Trade Podcast. I was fed up with the “fake” millionaire traders and the “get-rich-quick-trading guys”. That's why you can expect more free content from me than what other people charge for!

If you truly want to succeed in Forex trading, I believe you need to keep working on yourself so you can improve your strengths, but also your weaknesses. Do not focus solely on what you're good at.

// Disclaimer
This video expresses my personal opinion only. Forex trading is risky. Make sure you are ready to trade. Even this will not guarantee you positive results. I am not responsible for any losses incurred due to your trading or anything else. I do not recommend any specific trade or action.

snippet.title: "Professional Trader Secrets Revealed" - Ali Crooks | Trader Interview
snippet.description:
In this trader interview, I sit down with full-time professional trader Ali Crooks. He has been trading for close to 20 years and runs a private fund. We discuss how he sees the market, his mindset, and his techniques when it comes to backtesting, live trading, and more!

📈 FREE Case Study "Quitting Your Job To Finally Trade Full-Time": https://desiretotrade.co/case-study

#professionaltrader #trading #fulltimetrader 

Chapters:
0:00 Start
0:11 Introduction
0:35 Who is Ali Crooks and what does he do?
1:17 What is needed to maintain successful trading for the long term
4:30 How successful traders deal with the realities of trading
7:06 How to stop making the same mistakes as a trader
11:18 How journaling can help you find critical patterns of a trader
13:04 How is Ali Crooks private fund going?
15:44 How managing a fund affected Ali's trading
18:18 Ali's top advice for traders to manage external capital
20:43 How to use algo trading properly
24:03 The reality of algo trading
25:03 What to expect with algo trading
27:38 A quick way to look at backtest results vs reality
29:52 Setting up expectations between backtesting and live trading
31:21 When should you drop a strategy if it's not working
34:52 Ali's advice for traders afraid of trading live
37:43 Common mistakes of traders
39:25 The importance of expectations in trading
40:52 How to explain drawdowns to investors
41:44 Where to find Ali Crooks
